ast.name: content
ast.source: The Apps To make Tag and Tally easier there are several tools that can help you.
ast.target: 应用程序 为了让标签和计数更简单，有几款工具可以帮到您。

ast.name: content
ast.source: If you use Obsidian.md, you can download a vault, with the markdown files for the game installed, a plugin with the forge tool built in, the rules are also in a pretty format, and several commands that can be helpful. You can download the vault from Google Drive.
ast.target: 如果您使用 Obsidian.md，您可以下载一个保险库，其中已安装游戏的 Markdown 文件、一个内置锻造工具的插件、格式美观的规则，以及一些有用的命令。您可以从 Google Drive 下载该保险库。

ast.name: content
ast.source: If you don't want to use Obsidian.md, there is a web app that you can install to your desktop or your mobile device and it will work on and offline. You can visit the forge at https://forge.tagandtally.quest
ast.target: 如果您不想使用 Obsidian.md，有一个网络应用可以安装到您的桌面或移动设备上，它支持在线和离线使用。您可以访问 https://forge.tagandtally.quest 上的锻造工具。

ast.name: content
ast.source: The docs are also available online and offline on the web at https://tageandtally.quest.
ast.target: 文档也可以在 https://tageandtally.quest 上在线和离线访问。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Split the tarot Deck into Major arcana, all numbered suits, and all court suits to make 3 decks. The Major Arcana will help you pick a descriptor, the suit court cards will determine the type and the numbered suit cards will determine the does something special. Descriptor
ast.target: 将塔罗牌组分为大阿卡纳、所有数字花色牌和所有宫廷牌，组成 3 副牌组。大阿卡纳将帮助您选择一个描述词，宫廷牌将决定类型，数字花色牌将决定特殊能力。描述词

ast.name: content
ast.source: Advantage: when rolling with advantage, you roll two dice and take the highest result.
ast.target: 优势：当进行优势掷骰时，您掷两个骰子并取最高结果。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Ease: to lower the level of a task/check resulting in a lower DC.
ast.target: 降低：降低任务/检定的等级，从而降低难度等级。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Flaw: an attribute that describes an aspect of the character that could be considered bad. A flaw is a tag that can be uses to ease or hinder any appropriate roll.
ast.target: 缺陷：描述角色某个可能被视为负面的特质的属性。缺陷是一个标签，可用于降低或阻碍任何适当的掷骰。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Hinder: to raise the level of a task/check resulting in a lower DC.
ast.target: 阻碍：提高任务/检定的等级，从而提高难度等级。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Species: a word or phrase that defines a characters birth attributes such as elf, dwarf or even more specific as a shadow elf. Species can be used as a tag to ease and hinder any appropriate roll.
ast.target: 种族：定义角色出生属性的词语或短语，例如精灵、矮人，甚至更具体的如暗影精灵。种族可用作标签来降低或阻碍任何适当的掷骰。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Umbrella Tag: All tags in the character sentence are considered Umbrella tags. These tags have a series of other tags that they embody. And if a player can logically explain reasons an umbrella tag can be used for to ease or hinder that action. ^6ca8a3
ast.target: 总括标签：角色句子中的所有标签都被视为总括标签。这些标签包含一系列其他标签。如果玩家能合理解释总括标签可用于降低或阻碍某个行动的原因。^6ca8a3

ast.name: content
ast.source: Wound: a disadvantage taken after dropping a creature to zero harm. Wounds can be physical or mental, permanent or temporary depending on how they were received.
ast.target: 创伤：在将生物伤害值降至零后承受的劣势。创伤可以是身体或心理上的，永久或暂时的，取决于其获得方式。

ast.name: content
ast.source: A Character in Tag & Tally is a collection of tags that can ease or hinder game play.
ast.target: 在《标签与计数》中，角色是一组可以降低或阻碍游戏进程的标签集合。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Background Tag: Defining adolescent experience. Flaw Tag : Personality flaw emerging in adolescence. Additional Tags: Skills, traits, or habits formed during adolescence.
ast.target: 背景标签：定义青少年时期的经历。缺陷标签：青少年时期显现的性格缺陷。附加标签：青少年时期形成的技能、特质或习惯。

ast.name: content
ast.source: If you want a much older character we have rules for that. While you know more, and learn more, you also have a lot more flaws as you advance with age. So keep that in mind when using these rules.
ast.target: 如果你想要一个年长得多的角色，我们有相应的规则。虽然你知道得更多，学得更多，但随着年龄增长，你也会有更多缺陷。所以在使用这些规则时，请记住这一点。

ast.name: content
ast.source: When detailing a character's appearance, you may roll or choose from the Character tables: pronoun, age, distinguishing feature type, skin tone, complexion, build/height, hair (texture, style, color), eye color, clothing, and voice.
ast.target: 在详细描述角色外貌时，你可以掷骰或从角色表格中选择：代词、年龄、显著特征类型、肤色、肤色、体型/身高、头发（质地、样式、颜色）、眼睛颜色、服装和声音。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Background Tag: Defining moment of childhood. Flaw Tag: Personality flaw shaped by early life. Additional Tags (up to 2): Early abilities, traits, or learned habits.
ast.target: 背景标签：童年决定性时刻。缺陷标签：由早期生活塑造的性格缺陷。附加标签（最多2个）：早期能力、特质或习得的习惯。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Background Tag: Defining life-changing event or experience. Occupation Tag: Current occupation or primary life role (job, apprenticeship, or student). Flaw Tag: Flaw tied to ambition, independence, or early mistakes. Additional Tags: Skills, habits, or traits developed in young adulthood.
ast.target: 背景标签：改变人生的决定性事件或经历。职业标签：当前职业或主要生活角色（工作、学徒或学生）。缺陷标签：与野心、独立或早期错误相关的缺陷。附加标签：青年时期发展的技能、习惯或特质。

ast.name: content
ast.source: A Creature in Tag & Tally is a collection of tags that can ease or hinder game play.
ast.target: 在《标签与计数》中，生物是一组可以缓解或阻碍游戏进程的标签。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Quest: Discover who is smuggling relics through the river docks
ast.target: 任务：查明谁在通过河运码头走私文物

ast.name: content
ast.source: Quest update: - The investigation quest advances sideways; the smugglers are now alert Insight update: - Ilya gains a partial and risky insight instead of a clean one Character change: - Temporary tag added: Marked by the Smugglers
ast.target: 任务更新：- 调查任务横向推进；走私者现在警觉了 洞察更新：- 伊利亚获得了一个部分且有风险的洞察，而非清晰的洞察 角色变化：- 添加临时标签：被走私者标记

ast.name: content
ast.source: Future dock scenes may justify higher opposition or predefined threat levels Ilya’s personal quest is pressured; reputation risk increases The scene ends because the original intent is meaningfully altered.
ast.target: 未来的码头场景可能需要更高的对抗等级或预设的威胁等级 伊利亚的个人任务受到压力；声誉风险增加 场景结束，因为原始意图已被有意义地改变。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Name: Ilya Personal Quest: Prove I am more than my family’s reputation Relevant Tags: - Trained Investigator - Known to the Dockworkers - Haunted by a Past Failure
ast.target: 姓名：伊利亚 个人任务：证明我不仅仅是家族声誉 相关标签：- 训练有素的调查员 - 码头工人认识 - 被过去的失败困扰

ast.name: content
ast.source: This is not the first scene of play. The previous scene was Level 4. Dice formula: 1d6 + 2 Roll: 3 + 2 = Scene Level 5 The docks are moderately dangerous, tense, and active.
ast.target: 这不是游戏的第一个场景。上一个场景是4级。骰子公式：1d6 + 2 掷骰结果：3 + 2 = 场景等级5 码头中等危险、紧张且活跃。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Rolled result: “Someone is watching, but it’s not clear who.” This informs tone but does not impose mechanics yet.
ast.target: 掷骰结果：“有人在观察，但不清楚是谁。”这影响了氛围，但尚未施加机制。

ast.name: content
ast.source: The player selects the following modifiers: Time of day: Late night Weather: Cold rain These elements shape the fiction and may justify tags.
ast.target: 玩家选择以下修饰符：时间：深夜 天气：冷雨 这些元素塑造了虚构世界，并可能为标签提供依据。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Immediate goal: Identify who is coordinating the smuggling operation tonight. Quest advanced or threatened: - Advances the smuggling investigation quest - Risks complicating Ilya’s personal quest if he fails publicly
ast.target: 即时目标：确定今晚谁在协调走私行动。任务推进或受到威胁：- 推进走私调查任务 - 如果公开失败，可能使伊利亚的个人任务复杂化

ast.name: content
ast.source: If successful: - Gain a solid insight identifying a key smuggler If failed: - The smugglers notice Ilya’s interest and take countermeasures
ast.target: 如果成功：- 获得一个可靠的洞察，识别出一名关键走私者 如果失败：- 走私者注意到伊利亚的兴趣并采取反制措施

ast.name: content
ast.source: Tag and Tally is meant to be played solo or in a gm-less way. When playing with multiple players it is important to have a structure to how the world reacts to you and the rest of the party. There are several methods to do this.
ast.target: 《标签与计数》旨在单人或无游戏主持人的方式游玩。当与多名玩家一起游玩时，重要的是要有一个结构来描述世界如何对你和队伍的其他成员做出反应。有几种方法可以做到这一点。

ast.name: content
ast.source: An item in Tag & Tally is a collection of tags that can be used to ease or hinder game play.
ast.target: 在《标签与计数》中，物品是一组可以用来缓解或阻碍游戏进程的标签。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Follow the following simple steps to create an item. Create a concept of what you want the item to be. Design the item sentence around this concept. Roll 1d10 to determine the level of the item.
ast.target: 按照以下简单步骤创建物品。构思你想要物品成为的概念。围绕这个概念设计物品描述句。掷1d10来确定物品的等级。

ast.name: content
ast.source: An NPC in Tag & Tally is a collection of tags that can ease or hinder game play.
ast.target: 在《标签与计数》中，NPC是一组可以缓解或阻碍游戏进程的标签。

ast.name: content
ast.source: When creating a party in Tag and Tally, whether in solo play or with a group there should always be connections.
ast.target: 在《标签与计数》中创建队伍时，无论是单人游戏还是团队游戏，都应该始终存在联系。

ast.name: content
ast.source: As with character advancement some quests can alter the status of these bonds, changing the shared tag completely, or increasing its effective tier level. The Relationship type could also evolve, you could lose touch, or become rivals. All possible with in the real of the story.
ast.target: 与角色成长类似，一些任务可以改变这些纽带的状态，完全改变共享标签，或提高其有效等级。关系类型也可能演变，你们可能失去联系，或成为对手。所有这些都在故事的范围内是可能的。

ast.name: content
ast.source: To start playing we need to answer a few questions. Where? Who? What and Why? We've shown you the answer to the question "How?" in the previous section.
ast.target: 要开始游戏，我们需要回答几个问题。在哪里？谁？什么和为什么？我们在上一节中已经展示了“如何？”的答案。

ast.name: content
ast.source: If you have no idea start asking the Oracle questions. Some that are good to start with. Have the characters already met? Are the characters in a settlement? Do they have a mission? Do they work for anyone? These questions will lead to other questions and you can surmise a beginning to your story.
ast.target: 如果你毫无头绪，开始向神谕提问。一些好的起始问题。角色们已经认识了吗？角色们在一个定居点吗？他们有任务吗？他们为任何人工作吗？这些问题将引出其他问题，你可以推断出故事的开端。

ast.name: content
ast.source: What is the purpose of the game Now that you have your characters and your setting it's time to think about what the character(s) are going to do. There are several methods you go could about doing this. I like The Oracle Method and the Quest Method.
ast.target: 游戏的目的是什么 既然你有了角色和背景，是时候思考角色们将要做什么了。有几种方法可以做到这一点。我喜欢神谕法和任务法。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Species are an umbrella tag with some special characteristics.
ast.target: 物种是一个具有某些特殊特征的总括标签。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Create a species sentence Determine Languages Determine if species has innate magic and which types and what their Base MAI is. Assign a Weakness Determine 2 abilities/traits \ \ for each additional beyond 2 another weakness/flaw must be added
ast.target: 创建一个物种描述句 确定语言 确定物种是否拥有天生魔法，以及哪些类型及其基础魔法能力指数。分配一个弱点 确定2个能力/特质 \\ \\ 每增加一个能力/特质，必须增加一个弱点/缺陷

ast.name: content
ast.source: !character Species This species is a \aged \descriptor\ people who \cultural trait or motivation\ and \physical/biological feature\.
ast.target: !character 物种 这个物种是一个 \\aged \\descriptor\\ 的人，他们 \\cultural trait or motivation\\ 并且 \\physical/biological feature\\。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Spells are a simplified sentence but their core is built on following the procedure to determine the level of the spell.
ast.target: 法术是一个简化的句子，但其核心是基于遵循确定法术等级的程序。

ast.name: content
ast.source: !magic Spell Name is a \descriptor\ \base\ spell that \does something\.
ast.target: !magic 法术名称 是一个 \\descriptor\\ \\base\\ 法术，它 \\does something\\。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Types are an umbrella tag. They are a specific sentence, and often have a parent type from which they hail. The parent type does not have a parent type — no grandparents here.
ast.target: 类型是一个总括性标签。它们是一个特定的句子，并且通常有一个父类型作为其来源。父类型没有父类型——这里没有祖父母。

ast.name: content

ast.name: content
ast.source: | Level | DC | Description | | ----- | --- | ------------ | | 1 | 3 | Simple | | 2 | 6 | Standard | | 3 | 9 | Demanding | | 4 | 12 | Difficult | | 5 | 15 | Challenging | | 6 | 18 | Intimidating | | 7 | 21 | Formidable | | 8 | 24 | Heroic | | 9 | 27 | Immortal | | 10 | 30 | Impossible |

ast.name: content
ast.source: Crafting, Theiving, Hunting, Trapping, Navigation, and other specialty tasks that have multiple tools can have a kit that contain all the tools necessary and only take up one slot.
ast.target: 制作、盗窃、狩猎、陷阱、导航以及其他需要多种工具的专业任务，可以拥有一个包含所有必要工具的工具包，并且只占用一个槽位。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Represents discovery of the quest’s endpoint or key sites. Default length: 5 marks Must be completed to attempt the quest resolution. Effect: Completing the location tally reduces the countdown by 1 mark.
ast.target: 代表发现任务的终点或关键地点。默认长度：5个标记。必须完成才能尝试任务结算。效果：完成地点计数会将倒计时减少1个标记。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Quests may have multiple intermediate steps. Each step completed: - Counts toward the Plan tally if preparation was required. - Reduces the Countdown tally by 1 mark. Allows for branching or staged objectives, giving players opportunities to actively mitigate consequences.
ast.target: 任务可能有多个中间步骤。每个完成的步骤：- 如果需要准备，则计入计划计数。- 将倒计时计数减少1个标记。允许分支或分阶段目标，为玩家提供主动减轻后果的机会。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Downtime Points represent the number of activities you can do that constitute resting in safe zone allowing you to heal wounds. You do not have to sleep, but it is recommended each character sleep 4 hours so they wake up Refreshed.
ast.target: 休息点数代表你可以在安全区内进行的休息活动数量，这些活动可以让你治愈伤势。你不必睡觉，但建议每个角色睡4小时，这样他们醒来时会精神焕发。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You may cook a meal, go out to a restaurant. Sending 1 hour at a dinner downtime activity yields the \Well fed tag for the following day. You may only spend 1 hour at Dinner.
ast.target: 你可以烹饪一顿饭，或者去餐厅。在晚餐休息活动上花费1小时，可获得第二天的 \\饱食 标签。你只能在晚餐上花费1小时。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Meditating for 1 hour provides you with a \Zen tag for the following day. You may only meditate for 1 hour a night.
ast.target: 冥想1小时可为你提供第二天的 \\禅定 标签。你每晚只能冥想1小时。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Sleeping gives you a \Refreshed Tag for the following day. No matter how many hours you sleep the tag does not tier. In addition to the \Refreshed Tag, for every 4 hours of sleep a character may heal one additional type of injury (all strains, 1 lingering trauma, or downgrade 1 debilitating injury).
ast.target: 睡觉会为你提供第二天的 \\精神焕发 标签。无论你睡多少小时，该标签都不会升级。除了 \\精神焕发 标签外，每睡4小时，角色可以额外治愈一种类型的伤势（所有劳损、1个持续创伤，或降级1个致残伤害）。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Every NPC has a Permanent Disposition (how they feel about you generally) and a Temporary Attitude (their current mood). Permanent Disposition: Provides a baseline Ease (-) or Hinder (+) to the Task Level. Temporary Attitude: Determined by the Drift Roll at the start of a scene.
ast.target: 每个NPC都有一个永久倾向（他们对你的一般感觉）和一个临时态度（他们当前的情绪）。永久倾向：为任务等级提供一个基准的降低（-）或增加（+）。临时态度：由场景开始时的漂移掷骰决定。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are more than welcome to write/play out actual dialog and have a conversation with your NPCs. Or if you aren't feeling like a novelist or story teller today you can opt to choose a more mechanical method below. Pick a Pathway.
ast.target: 你完全可以编写/演绎实际的对话，并与你的NPC进行交谈。或者，如果你今天不想当小说家或讲故事的人，你可以选择下面更机械化的方法。选择一条路径。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Air, Earth, Water, Fire Life, Death Mind, Time, Space, Sound, Illusion Shadow, Light
ast.target: 风、土、水、火 生、死 心智、时间、空间、声音、幻象 暗影、光明

ast.name: content
ast.source: Order — structure and stability Chaos — Motion and transformation Void — Nullification and isolation Spirit — Conscious link
ast.target: 秩序 — 结构与稳定 混沌 — 运动与转变 虚空 — 无效化与孤立 灵魂 — 意识链接

ast.name: content
ast.source: Spells are cast in one of four ways using Artifacts. These artifacts define how a spell is executed and influence its ease, risk, and activation.
ast.target: 法术通过四种方式之一使用神器来施放。这些神器定义了法术的执行方式，并影响其难度、风险和激活。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Spells have a sentence like all other things in Tag & Tally. !magic Spell Name is a \descriptor\ \base\ spell that \does something\.
ast.target: 法术和Tag & Tally中的其他事物一样，都有一个句子结构。!magic 法术名称 是一个 \\descriptor\\ \\base\\ 法术，它 \\does something\\。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Damage — Harmful effects Counter — Nullifies or prevents effects Control — Manipulates forces/objects Summon — Calls forth creatures or objects Ward — Protection-based effects
ast.target: 伤害 — 有害效果 反制 — 无效化或阻止效果 控制 — 操纵力量/物体 召唤 — 召唤生物或物体 守护 — 基于保护的效果

ast.name: content
ast.source: Every player character should have enough income to survive with their base expenses. Your income is your base Wealth value. For the most part the income shouldn't change unless there are in game reasons for it to do so.
ast.target: 每个玩家角色都应该有足够的收入来维持基本开销。你的收入就是你的基础财富值。在大多数情况下，收入不应改变，除非有游戏内的原因导致其变化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Euler's number, the base of the natural logarithm. Approximately equal to 2.71828
ast.target: 欧拉数，自然对数的底数。约等于2.71828

ast.name: description
ast.source: Imaginary unit, defined as i*i=-1. A complex number is described as a + b*i, where a is the real part, and b is the imaginary part.
ast.target: 虚数单位，定义为 i*i=-1。复数表示为 a + b*i，其中 a 是实部，b 是虚部。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Infinity, a number which is larger than the maximum number that can be handled by a floating point number.
ast.target: 无穷大，一个大于浮点数可处理的最大数值的数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the natural logarithm of 10, approximately equal to 2.302
ast.target: 返回10的自然对数，约等于2.302

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the natural logarithm of 2, approximately equal to 0.693
ast.target: 返回2的自然对数，约等于0.693

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the base-10 logarithm of E, approximately equal to 0.434
ast.target: 返回以10为底E的对数，约等于0.434

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the base-2 logarithm of E, approximately equal to 1.442
ast.target: 返回以2为底E的对数，约等于1.442

ast.name: description
ast.source: Phi is the golden ratio. Two quantities are in the golden ratio if their ratio is the same as the ratio of their sum to the larger of the two quantities. Phi is defined as `(1 + sqrt(5)) / 2` and is approximately 1.618034...
ast.target: Phi 是黄金比例。如果两个量的比值等于它们的和与两者中较大者的比值，则这两个量处于黄金比例。Phi 定义为 `(1 + sqrt(5)) / 2`，约等于1.618034...

ast.name: description
ast.source: The number pi is a mathematical constant that is the ratio of a circle's circumference to its diameter, and is approximately equal to 3.14159
ast.target: 圆周率 pi 是一个数学常数，是圆的周长与直径的比值，约等于3.14159

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the square root of 1/2, approximately equal to 0.707

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the square root of 2, approximately equal to 1.414

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tau is the ratio constant of a circle's circumference to radius, equal to 2 * pi, approximately 6.2832.
ast.target: Tau 是圆的周长与半径的比值常数，等于 2 * pi，约等于6.2832。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a big number from a number or string.
ast.target: 从数字或字符串创建一个大数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a bigint, an integer with an arbitrary number of digits, from a number or string.
ast.target: 从数字或字符串创建一个大整数，即具有任意位数的整数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert a string or number into a boolean.
ast.target: 将字符串或数字转换为布尔值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a user-defined unit and register it with the Unit type.
ast.target: 创建一个用户自定义单位并将其注册到 Unit 类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a fraction from a number or from integer numerator and denominator.
ast.target: 从数字或从整数分子和分母创建一个分数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create an index to get or replace a subset of a matrix
ast.target: 创建一个索引以获取或替换矩阵的子集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a number or convert a string or boolean into a number.
ast.target: 创建一个数字或将字符串或布尔值转换为数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Split a unit in an array of units whose sum is equal to the original unit.
ast.target: 将一个单位拆分为一个单位数组，其总和等于原始单位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a string or convert a value to a string
ast.target: 创建一个字符串或将值转换为字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Import functions or constants from an object.
ast.target: 从对象导入函数或常量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Takes the derivative of an expression expressed in parser Nodes. The derivative will be taken over the supplied variable in the second parameter. If there are multiple variables in the expression, it will return a partial derivative.
ast.target: 对以解析器节点表示的表达式求导。导数将对第二个参数中提供的变量求取。如果表达式中有多个变量，它将返回偏导数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Computes the number of leaves in the parse tree of the given expression
ast.target: 计算给定表达式的解析树中的叶子节点数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Finds one solution of the linear system L * x = b where L is an [n x n] lower triangular matrix and b is a [n] column vector.
ast.target: 求解线性系统 L * x = b 的一个解，其中 L 是一个 [n x n] 下三角矩阵，b 是一个 [n] 列向量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Finds all solutions of the linear system L * x = b where L is an [n x n] lower triangular matrix and b is a [n] column vector.
ast.target: 求解线性系统 L * x = b 的所有解，其中 L 是一个 [n x n] 下三角矩阵，b 是一个 [n] 列向量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the Matrix LU decomposition with partial pivoting. Matrix A is decomposed in three matrices (L, U, P) where P * A = L * U
ast.target: 计算矩阵的带部分主元的 LU 分解。矩阵 A 被分解为三个矩阵 (L, U, P)，其中 P * A = L * U。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Solves the linear system A * x = b where A is an [n x n] matrix and b is a [n] column vector.
ast.target: 求解线性系统 A * x = b，其中 A 是一个 [n x n] 矩阵，b 是一个 [n] 列向量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Finds the roots of a univariate polynomial given by its coefficients starting from constant, linear, and so on, increasing in degree.
ast.target: 根据从常数、线性项等开始、次数递增的系数，求一元多项式的根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the Matrix QR decomposition. Matrix `A` is decomposed in two matrices (`Q`, `R`) where `Q` is an orthogonal matrix and `R` is an upper triangular matrix.
ast.target: 计算矩阵的 QR 分解。矩阵 `A` 被分解为两个矩阵 (`Q`, `R`)，其中 `Q` 是正交矩阵，`R` 是上三角矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Transform a rationalizable expression in a rational fraction. If rational fraction is one variable polynomial then converts the numerator and denominator in canonical form, with decreasing exponents, returning the coefficients of numerator.
ast.target: 将可有理化的表达式转换为有理分式。如果该有理分式是单变量多项式，则将分子和分母转换为规范形式（指数递减），并返回分子的系数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Recursively substitute variables in an expression tree.
ast.target: 递归地替换表达式树中的变量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace constant subexpressions of node with their values.
ast.target: 用节点的常量子表达式的值替换它们。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Perform simple one-pass simplifications on an expression tree.
ast.target: 对表达式树执行简单的单遍简化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the Matrix LU decomposition with full pivoting. Matrix A is decomposed in two matrices (L, U) and two permutation vectors (pinv, q) where P * A * Q = L * U
ast.target: 计算矩阵的带完全主元的 LU 分解。矩阵 A 被分解为两个矩阵 (L, U) 和两个置换向量 (pinv, q)，其中 P * A * Q = L * U。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns true if the difference of the expressions simplifies to 0
ast.target: 如果两个表达式的差简化为 0，则返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Finds one solution of the linear system U * x = b where U is an [n x n] upper triangular matrix and b is a [n] column vector.
ast.target: 求解线性系统 U * x = b 的一个解，其中 U 是一个 [n x n] 上三角矩阵，b 是一个 [n] 列向量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Finds all solutions of the linear system U * x = b where U is an [n x n] upper triangular matrix and b is a [n] column vector.
ast.target: 求解线性系统 U * x = b 的所有解，其中 U 是一个 [n x n] 上三角矩阵，b 是一个 [n] 列向量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the cubic root value. If x = y * y * y, then y is the cubic root of x. When `x` is a number or complex number, an optional second argument `allRoots` can be provided to return all three cubic roots. If not provided, the principal root is returned
ast.target: 计算立方根值。如果 x = y * y * y，则 y 是 x 的立方根。当 `x` 是数字或复数时，可以提供可选的第二个参数 `allRoots` 来返回所有三个立方根。如果未提供，则返回主根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Round a value towards plus infinity. If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards plus infinity.
ast.target: 向正无穷方向舍入一个值。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向正无穷方向舍入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the cube of a value. The cube of x is x * x * x.
ast.target: 计算一个值的立方。x 的立方是 x * x * x。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the power of x to y element wise.
ast.target: 逐元素计算 x 的 y 次幂。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the exponent of a value.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the matrix exponential, expm(A) = e^A. The matrix must be square. Not to be confused with exp(a), which performs element-wise exponentiation.
ast.target: 计算矩阵指数，expm(A) = e^A。矩阵必须是方阵。不要与 exp(a) 混淆，后者执行逐元素指数运算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the value of subtracting 1 from the exponential value.
ast.target: 计算指数值减去 1 的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Round a value towards zero. If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards zero.
ast.target: 向零方向舍入一个值。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向零方向舍入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Round a value towards minus infinity.If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards minus infinity.
ast.target: 向负无穷方向舍入一个值。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向负无穷方向舍入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the hypotenuse of a list with values.
ast.target: 计算一组值的斜边长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the (modular) multiplicative inverse of a modulo b. Solution to the equation ax ≣ 1 (mod b)
ast.target: 计算 a 模 b 的（模）乘法逆元。方程 ax ≣ 1 (mod b) 的解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the logarithm of a value. If no base is provided, the natural logarithm of x is calculated. If base if provided, the logarithm is calculated for the specified base. log(x, base) is defined as log(x) / log(base).
ast.target: 计算一个值的对数。如果未提供底数，则计算 x 的自然对数。如果提供了底数，则计算指定底数的对数。log(x, base) 定义为 log(x) / log(base)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the 10-base logarithm of a value.
ast.target: 计算一个值的以10为底的对数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the 2-base of a value. This is the same as calculating `log(x, 2)`.
ast.target: 计算一个值的以2为底的对数。这与计算 `log(x, 2)` 相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the modulus, the remainder of an integer division.
ast.target: 计算模数，即整数除法的余数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the norm of a number, vector or matrix.
ast.target: 计算数字、向量或矩阵的范数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the nth root of a value. The principal nth root of a positive real number A, is the positive real solution of the equation "x^root = A".
ast.target: 计算一个值的 n 次方根。正实数 A 的主 n 次方根是方程 \"x^root = A\" 的正实数解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the nth roots of a value. An nth root of a positive real number A, is a positive real solution of the equation "x^root = A". This function returns an array of complex values.
ast.target: 计算一个值的所有 n 次方根。正实数 A 的 n 次方根是方程 \"x^root = A\" 的正实数解。此函数返回一个复数值数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the power of x to y, x^y.
ast.target: 计算 x 的 y 次幂，x^y。

ast.name: description
ast.source: round a value towards the nearest integer.If x is complex, both real and imaginary part are rounded towards the nearest integer. When n is specified, the value is rounded to n decimals.
ast.target: 向最近的整数舍入一个值。如果 x 是复数，则实部和虚部都向最近的整数舍入。当指定 n 时，值将舍入到 n 位小数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the sign of a value. The sign of a value x is 1 when x>0, -1 when x<0, and 0 when x=0.
ast.target: 计算一个值的符号。值 x 的符号在 x>0 时为 1，x<0 时为 -1，x=0 时为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the square root value. If x = y * y, then y is the square root of x.
ast.target: 计算平方根值。如果 x = y * y，则 y 是 x 的平方根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the principal square root of a square matrix. The principal square root matrix `X` of another matrix `A` is such that `X * X = A`.
ast.target: 计算方阵的主平方根。矩阵 `A` 的主平方根矩阵 `X` 满足 `X * X = A`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Solves the real-valued Sylvester equation AX+XB=C for X
ast.target: 求解实值 Sylvester 方程 AX+XB=C 中的 X。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Performs a real Schur decomposition of the real matrix A = UTU'
ast.target: 对实矩阵 A = UTU' 执行实 Schur 分解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Solves the Continuous-time Lyapunov equation AP+PA'+Q=0 for P
ast.target: 求解连续时间 Lyapunov 方程 AP+PA'+Q=0 中的 P。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the square of a value. The square of x is x * x.
ast.target: 计算一个值的平方。x 的平方是 x * x。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inverse the sign of a value. Converts booleans and strings to numbers.
ast.target: 反转一个值的符号。将布尔值和字符串转换为数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Converts booleans and strings to numbers.
ast.target: 将布尔值和字符串转换为数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the extended greatest common divisor for two values. The result is an array [d, x, y] with 3 entries, where d is the greatest common divisor, and d = x * a + y * b.
ast.target: 计算两个值的扩展最大公约数。结果是一个包含 3 个条目的数组 [d, x, y]，其中 d 是最大公约数，且 d = x * a + y * b。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise AND operation. Performs the logical AND operation on each pair of the corresponding bits of the two given values by multiplying them. If both bits in the compared position are 1, the bit in the resulting binary representation is 1, otherwise, the result is 0
ast.target: 按位与操作。通过对两个给定值的每一对对应位执行逻辑与操作（相乘）来完成。如果比较位置中的两个位都是 1，则结果二进制表示中的位为 1，否则结果为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise NOT operation. Performs a logical negation on each bit of the given value. Bits that are 0 become 1, and those that are 1 become 0.
ast.target: 按位非操作。对给定值的每一位执行逻辑非操作。为 0 的位变为 1，为 1 的位变为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise OR operation. Performs the logical inclusive OR operation on each pair of corresponding bits of the two given values. The result in each position is 1 if the first bit is 1 or the second bit is 1 or both bits are 1, otherwise, the result is 0.
ast.target: 按位或操作。对两个给定值的每一对对应位执行逻辑或操作。如果第一位是 1 或第二位是 1 或两者都是 1，则每个位置的结果为 1，否则结果为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise XOR operation, exclusive OR. Performs the logical exclusive OR operation on each pair of corresponding bits of the two given values. The result in each position is 1 if only the first bit is 1 or only the second bit is 1, but will be 0 if both are 0 or both are 1.
ast.target: 按位异或操作，即异或。对两个给定值的每一对对应位执行逻辑异或操作。如果只有第一位是 1 或只有第二位是 1，则每个位置的结果为 1，但如果两者都是 0 或两者都是 1，则结果为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise left logical shift of a value x by y number of bits.
ast.target: 将值 x 按位左逻辑移位 y 位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise right arithmetic shift of a value x by y number of bits.
ast.target: 将值 x 按位右算术移位 y 位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bitwise right logical shift of a value x by y number of bits.
ast.target: 将值 x 按位右逻辑移位 y 位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Bell Numbers count the number of partitions of a set. A partition is a pairwise disjoint subset of S whose union is S. `bellNumbers` only takes integer arguments. The following condition must be enforced: n >= 0.
ast.target: 贝尔数计算一个集合的划分数量。划分是 S 的成对不相交子集，其并集为 S。`bellNumbers` 仅接受整数参数。必须满足以下条件：n >= 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Catalan Numbers enumerate combinatorial structures of many different types. catalan only takes integer arguments. The following condition must be enforced: n >= 0.
ast.target: 卡塔兰数用于枚举多种不同类型的组合结构。catalan 函数仅接受整数参数。必须满足以下条件：n >= 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The composition counts of n into k parts. composition only takes integer arguments. The following condition must be enforced: k <= n.
ast.target: 计算 n 分成 k 部分的组合数。composition 函数仅接受整数参数。必须满足以下条件：k <= n。

ast.name: description
ast.source: he Stirling numbers of the second kind, counts the number of ways to partition a set of n labelled objects into k nonempty unlabelled subsets. `stirlingS2` only takes integer arguments. The following condition must be enforced: k <= n. If n = k or k = 1, then s(n,k) = 1.
ast.target: 第二类斯特林数，计算将 n 个带标签的对象集合划分为 k 个非空无标签子集的方法数。`stirlingS2` 函数仅接受整数参数。必须满足以下条件：k <= n。如果 n = k 或 k = 1，则 s(n,k) = 1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the argument of a complex value. If x = a+bi, the argument is computed as atan2(b, a).
ast.target: 计算复数的辐角。若 x = a+bi，则辐角通过 atan2(b, a) 计算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the complex conjugate of a complex value. If x = a+bi, the complex conjugate is a-bi.
ast.target: 计算复数的共轭复数。若 x = a+bi，则其共轭复数为 a-bi。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the imaginary part of a complex number.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the real part of a complex number.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Evaluate an expression or an array with expressions.
ast.target: 计算表达式或包含表达式的数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a parser object that keeps a context of variables and their values, allowing the evaluation of expressions in that context.
ast.target: 创建一个解析器对象，该对象维护变量及其值的上下文，允许在该上下文中计算表达式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Parse an expression. Returns a node tree, which can be evaluated by invoking node.evaluate() or transformed into a functional object via node.compile().
ast.target: 解析表达式。返回一个节点树，可通过调用 node.evaluate() 进行计算，或通过 node.compile() 转换为函数对象。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Parse and compile an expression. Returns a an object with a function evaluate([scope]) to evaluate the compiled expression.
ast.target: 解析并编译表达式。返回一个对象，该对象包含一个函数 evaluate([scope]) 用于计算编译后的表达式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display documentation on a function or data type.
ast.target: 显示函数或数据类型的文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the Euclidean distance between two points.
ast.target: 计算两点之间的欧几里得距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Computes the intersection point of lines and/or planes.
ast.target: 计算直线和/或平面的交点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical and. Test whether two values are both defined with a nonzero/nonempty value.
ast.target: 逻辑与。测试两个值是否都定义为非零/非空值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical not. Flips the boolean value of given argument.
ast.target: 逻辑非。翻转给定参数的布尔值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nullish coalescing operator. Returns the right-hand operand when the left-hand operand is null or undefined, and otherwise returns the left-hand operand.
ast.target: 空值合并运算符。当左操作数为 null 或 undefined 时返回右操作数，否则返回左操作数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical or. Test if at least one value is defined with a nonzero/nonempty value.
ast.target: 逻辑或。测试至少一个值是否定义为非零/非空值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical exclusive or, xor. Test whether one and only one value is defined with a nonzero/nonempty value.
ast.target: 逻辑异或，xor。测试是否只有一个值定义为非零/非空值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate a matrix one dimension less than A by applying callback to each slice of A along dimension dim.
ast.target: 通过对矩阵 A 沿维度 dim 的每个切片应用回调函数，生成一个比 A 少一个维度的矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return a column from a matrix or array.
ast.target: 从矩阵或数组中返回一列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Concatenate matrices. By default, the matrices are concatenated by the last dimension. The dimension on which to concatenate can be provided as last argument.
ast.target: 连接矩阵。默认情况下，矩阵沿最后一个维度连接。可以提供最后一个参数来指定连接的维度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Count the number of elements of a matrix, array or string.
ast.target: 计算矩阵、数组或字符串的元素数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the cross product for two vectors in three dimensional space.
ast.target: 计算三维空间中两个向量的叉积。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Complex Conjugate and Transpose a matrix
ast.target: 对矩阵进行复共轭和转置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the determinant of a matrix

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the dot product of two vectors. The dot product of A = [a1, a2, a3, ..., an] and B = [b1, b2, b3, ..., bn] is defined as dot(A, B) = a1 * b1 + a2 * b2 + a3 * b3 + ... + an * bn
ast.target: 计算两个向量的点积。向量 A = [a1, a2, a3, ..., an] 和 B = [b1, b2, b3, ..., bn] 的点积定义为 dot(A, B) = a1 * b1 + a2 * b2 + a3 * b3 + ... + an * bn。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the eigenvalues and optionally eigenvectors of a square matrix
ast.target: 计算方阵的特征值，并可选地计算特征向量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flatten a multi dimensional matrix into a single dimensional matrix.
ast.target: 将多维矩阵展平为一维矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Iterates over all elements of a matrix/array, and executes the given callback function.
ast.target: 遍历矩阵/数组的所有元素，并执行给定的回调函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find the data type of all elements in a matrix or array, for example "number" if all items are a number and "Complex" if all values are complex numbers. If a matrix contains more than one data type, it will return "mixed".
ast.target: 查找矩阵或数组中所有元素的数据类型，例如，如果所有项都是数字则返回 \"number\"，如果所有值都是复数则返回 \"Complex\"。如果矩阵包含多种数据类型，则返回 \"mixed\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns the identity matrix with size m-by-n. The matrix has ones on the diagonal and zeros elsewhere.
ast.target: 返回大小为 m×n 的单位矩阵。该矩阵对角线上为 1，其余位置为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the inverse of a matrix

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the Moore–Penrose inverse of a matrix
ast.target: 计算矩阵的摩尔-彭若斯广义逆。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the Kronecker product of 2 matrices or vectors.
ast.target: 计算两个矩阵或向量的克罗内克积。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new matrix or array with the results of the callback function executed on each entry of the matrix/array or the matrices/arrays.
ast.target: 创建一个新矩阵或数组，其元素是通过对矩阵/数组或多个矩阵/数组的每个条目执行回调函数得到的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a dense matrix from vectors as individual columns.
ast.target: 通过将向量作为单独的列来创建稠密矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a matrix by evaluating a generating function at each index.
ast.target: 通过在每个索引处计算生成函数来创建矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a dense matrix from vectors as individual rows.
ast.target: 通过将向量作为单独的行来创建稠密矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 创建一个包含 1 的矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Partition-based selection of an array or 1D matrix. Will find the kth smallest value, and mutates the input array. Uses Quickselect.
ast.target: 基于分区选择数组或一维矩阵。将找到第k个最小值，并会修改输入数组。使用快速选择算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a range. Lower bound of the range is included, upper bound is excluded.
ast.target: 创建一个范围。范围的下界包含，上界不包含。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reshape a multi dimensional array to fit the specified dimensions.
ast.target: 重塑多维数组以适应指定的维度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Returns a 2-D rotation matrix (2x2) for a given angle (in radians). Returns a 2-D rotation matrix (3x3) of a given angle (in radians) around given axis.
ast.target: 返回给定角度（弧度）的二维旋转矩阵（2x2）。返回给定角度（弧度）围绕给定轴的二维旋转矩阵（3x3）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return a row from a matrix or array.
ast.target: 从矩阵或数组中返回一行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the size of a matrix.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort the items in a matrix. Compare can be a string "asc", "desc", "natural", or a custom sort function.
ast.target: 对矩阵中的项目进行排序。比较器可以是字符串“asc”、“desc”、“natural”，或自定义排序函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Remove inner and outer singleton dimensions from a matrix.
ast.target: 从矩阵中移除内部和外部的单一维度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the trace of a matrix: the sum of the elements on the main diagonal of a square matrix.
ast.target: 计算矩阵的迹：方阵主对角线上元素的和。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 创建一个包含零的矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the number of combinations of n items taken k at a time
ast.target: 计算从n个物品中一次取k个的组合数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the number of combinations of n items taken k at a time with replacements.
ast.target: 计算从n个物品中一次取k个的可重复组合数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the factorial of a value

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the gamma function. For small values, the Lanczos approximation is used, and for large values the extended Stirling approximation.
ast.target: 计算伽玛函数。对于小值，使用兰索斯近似；对于大值，使用扩展斯特林近似。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logarithm of the gamma function for real, positive numbers and complex numbers, using Lanczos approximation for numbers and Stirling series for complex numbers.
ast.target: 计算实数正数和复数的伽玛函数的对数，对数字使用兰索斯近似，对复数使用斯特林级数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculate the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence  between two distributions.
ast.target: 计算两个分布之间的库尔贝克-莱布勒（KL）散度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multinomial Coefficients compute the number of ways of picking a1, a2, ..., ai unordered outcomes from `n` possibilities. multinomial takes one array of integers as an argument. The following condition must be enforced: every ai > 0.
ast.target: 多项式系数计算从`n`种可能性中选取a1, a2, ..., ai个无序结果的方式数。multinomial函数接受一个整数数组作为参数。必须满足以下条件：每个ai > 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the number of permutations of n items taken k at a time
ast.target: 计算从n个物品中一次取k个的排列数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pick a random entry from a given array.
ast.target: 从给定数组中随机选取一个条目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compare two values. Returns 1 when x > y, -1 when x < y, and 0 when x == y.
ast.target: 比较两个值。当 x > y 时返回 1，当 x < y 时返回 -1，当 x == y 时返回 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compare two values of any type in a deterministic, natural way. Returns 1 when x > y, -1 when x < y, and 0 when x == y.
ast.target: 以确定、自然的方式比较任意类型的两个值。当 x > y 时返回 1，当 x < y 时返回 -1，当 x == y 时返回 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compare two strings lexically. Comparison is case sensitive. Returns 1 when x > y, -1 when x < y, and 0 when x == y.
ast.target: 按字典顺序比较两个字符串。比较区分大小写。当 x > y 时返回 1，当 x < y 时返回 -1，当 x == y 时返回 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check equality of two matrices element wise. Returns true if the size of both matrices is equal and when and each of the elements are equal.
ast.target: 逐元素检查两个矩阵是否相等。如果两个矩阵的大小相等且每个元素都相等，则返回 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check equality of two values. Returns true if the values are equal, and false if not.
ast.target: 检查两个值是否相等。如果值相等则返回 true，否则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check equality of two strings. Comparison is case sensitive. Returns true if the values are equal, and false if not.
ast.target: 检查两个字符串是否相等。比较区分大小写。如果值相等则返回 true，否则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check if value x is larger than y. Returns true if x is larger than y, and false if not. Comparing a value with NaN returns false.
ast.target: 检查值 x 是否大于 y。如果 x 大于 y 则返回 true，否则返回 false。将一个值与 NaN 比较会返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check if value x is larger or equal to y. Returns true if x is larger or equal to y, and false if not.
ast.target: 检查值 x 是否大于或等于 y。如果 x 大于或等于 y 则返回 true，否则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check if value x is smaller than value y. Returns true if x is smaller than y, and false if not. Comparing a value with NaN returns false.
ast.target: 检查值 x 是否小于值 y。如果 x 小于 y 则返回 true，否则返回 false。将一个值与 NaN 比较会返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check if value x is smaller or equal to value y. Returns true if x is smaller than y, and false if not.
ast.target: 检查值 x 是否小于或等于值 y。如果 x 小于 y 则返回 true，否则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check unequality of two values. Returns true if the values are unequal, and false if they are equal.
ast.target: 检查两个值是否不相等。如果值不相等则返回 true，如果相等则返回 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the cartesian product of two (multi)sets. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays and the values will be sorted in ascending order before the operation.
ast.target: 创建两个（多重）集合的笛卡尔积。多维数组将被转换为一维数组，并且值将在操作前按升序排序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the difference of two (multi)sets: every element of set1, that is not the element of set2. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays before the operation.
ast.target: 创建两个（多重）集合的差集：集合1中所有不属于集合2的元素。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Collect the distinct elements of a multiset. A multi-dimension array will be converted to a single-dimension array before the operation.
ast.target: 收集一个多重集合中的不同元素。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the intersection of two (multi)sets. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays before the operation.
ast.target: 创建两个（多重）集合的交集。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check whether a (multi)set is a subset of another (multi)set: every element of set1 is the element of set2. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays before the operation.
ast.target: 检查一个（多重）集合是否是另一个（多重）集合的子集：集合1中的每个元素都是集合2的元素。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Count the multiplicity of an element in a multiset. A multi-dimension array will be converted to a single-dimension array before the operation.
ast.target: 计算一个元素在多重集合中的重数。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the powerset of a (multi)set: the powerset contains very possible subsets of a (multi)set. A multi-dimension array will be converted to a single-dimension array before the operation.
ast.target: 创建一个（多重）集合的幂集：幂集包含一个（多重）集合的所有可能子集。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Count the number of elements of a (multi)set. When the second parameter "unique" is true, count only the unique values. A multi-dimension array will be converted to a single-dimension array before the operation.
ast.target: 计算一个（多重）集合的元素数量。当第二个参数 \"unique\" 为 true 时，仅计算唯一值。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the symmetric difference of two (multi)sets. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays before the operation.
ast.target: 创建两个（多重）集合的对称差集。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create the union of two (multi)sets. Multi-dimension arrays will be converted to single-dimension arrays before the operation.
ast.target: 创建两个（多重）集合的并集。多维数组将在操作前被转换为一维数组。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 计算零极点增益模型的传递函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Calculates the frequency response of a filter given its numerator and denominator coefficients.
ast.target: 根据给定的分子和分母系数，计算滤波器的频率响应。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the erf function of a value using a rational Chebyshev approximations for different intervals of x
ast.target: 使用针对 x 不同区间的有理切比雪夫逼近法，计算一个值的误差函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the Riemann Zeta Function using an infinite series and Riemann's Functional Equation for the entire complex plane
ast.target: 使用无穷级数和黎曼函数方程，在整个复平面上计算黎曼ζ函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the median absolute deviation of a matrix or a list with values. The median absolute deviation is defined as the median of the absolute deviations from the median.
ast.target: 计算一个矩阵或数值列表的中位数绝对偏差。中位数绝对偏差定义为与中位数的绝对偏差的中位数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the maximum value of a list of values. If any NaN values are found, the function yields the last NaN in the input.
ast.target: 计算一个数值列表的最大值。如果发现任何 NaN 值，函数将返回输入中的最后一个 NaN。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the arithmetic mean of a list of values.
ast.target: 计算一个数值列表的算术平均值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the median of all values. The values are sorted and the middle value is returned. In case of an even number of values, the average of the two middle values is returned.
ast.target: 计算所有值的中位数。对值进行排序并返回中间值。如果值的数量为偶数，则返回两个中间值的平均值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the minimum value of a list of values. If any NaN values are found, the function yields the last NaN in the input.
ast.target: 计算一个数值列表的最小值。如果发现任何 NaN 值，函数将返回输入中的最后一个 NaN。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 将所有值的众数计算为一个数组。如果众数不止一个，则返回一个包含多个值的数组。

ast.name: description

ast.name: description
ast.source: Compute the standard deviation of all values, defined as std(A) = sqrt(variance(A)). Optional parameter normalization can be "unbiased" (default), "uncorrected", or "biased".
ast.target: 计算所有值的标准差，定义为 std(A) = sqrt(variance(A))。可选参数 normalization 可以是 \"unbiased\"（默认）、\"uncorrected\" 或 \"biased\"。

ast.target: 可选的伤害类型（由伤口模板使用）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Type of resolution. 'oracle', 'secrets', and 'insights' use likelihood bands (ignore level). 'yes no' rolls 1d6 (even=Yes, odd=No) and ignores both level and likelihood. All other types use a numeric level 0-10.
ast.target: 解析类型。'oracle'、'secrets' 和 'insights' 使用可能性区间（忽略等级）。'yes no' 掷1d6（偶数=是，奇数=否），并忽略等级和可能性。所有其他类型使用0-10的数字等级。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Difficulty level 0-10 (0 Routine, 1 Simple, 2 Standard, 3 Demanding, 4 Difficult, 5 Challenging, 6 Interaction, 7 Formidable, 8 Heroic, 9 Immortal, 10 Impossible). DC = level * 3. Required for non-likelihood types; ignored for oracle/secrets/insights.
ast.target: 难度等级 0-10（0 日常，1 简单，2 标准，3 要求高，4 困难，5 具有挑战性，6 互动，7 艰巨，8 英雄，9 不朽，10 不可能）。DC = 等级 * 3。非可能性类型必需；对于 oracle/secrets/insights 则忽略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Likelihood modifier for oracle/secrets/insights. -3 = More Likely, 0 = 50/50, 3 = Less Likely. Ignored for other types.
ast.target: oracle/secrets/insights 的可能性修正值。-3 = 更可能，0 = 50/50，3 = 更不可能。其他类型忽略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional free text describing the question (for oracles) or the action being attempted. Echoed back in the formatted output.
ast.target: 可选的自由文本，描述问题（用于神谕）或正在尝试的动作。在格式化输出中回显。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which set to list. Defaults to 'all'.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional rulebook source filter, e.g. 'scene', 'fantasy/npc'. Ignored when kind is 'custom'.
ast.target: 可选的规则书来源过滤器，例如 'scene'、'fantasy/npc'。当 kind 为 'custom' 时忽略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate a full NPC/character appearance block: pronoun, age, height, build, hair, eyes, skin, clothing, voice, and a distinguishing feature (with sub-detail when relevant). Uses the bundled character-* tables. Takes no arguments. Returns a multi-line string with one trait per line.
ast.target: 生成完整的 NPC/角色外观描述块：代词、年龄、身高、体型、头发、眼睛、皮肤、服装、声音和一个显著特征（相关时包含子细节）。使用捆绑的 character-* 表格。不接受参数。返回一个每行一个特征的多行字符串。
